summary: Adds board archive, restore, and delete controls, MCP/CLI/API board lifecycle tools, update modal polish, and quieter board action feedback.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Archive boards out of the active list, restore archived boards, delete boards with typed confirmation and local backup, and use a calmer update modal.
